meta.title: Casa Canadá
meta.description: Commercial and cultural exchange between Brazil and Canada since 1997

hero.title: Connecting Brazil and Canada
hero.subtitle: Since 1997 facilitating commercial, cultural and educational exchange between both countries

consular.title: Visa Services
consular.description: Temporary resident visas, study and work permits. Accredited by the Canadian Consulate General for 29 years.

exchange.title: Study Abroad
exchange.description: Study programs in Canada — languages, courses, undergraduate and graduate programs with renowned institutions.

missions.title: Trade Missions
missions.description: Sector missions in aviation, agriculture, biotechnology, defense, education, automotive, environment, health and more.

events.title: Events
events.description: Coordination of participation in international festivals, congresses and fairs in film, fashion, technology and more.

about_preview.title: About Us
about_preview.text: Casa Canadá was founded in 1997 to strengthen commercial and cultural exchange between Brazil and Canada.
